calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Elder and Dependent Adult Abuse Restraining Order OSC for Hearing Only.
Dept. 514, Judge: Peter J. Bush, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carol Haraburda #8052,
Tom Drohan, Esq. for and with Petitioner Stephen Earl Driggs, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by the Defendant Jesse Driggs.
Proof of Service is in the file.
The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, Plaintiff's request for issuance of a restraining order is DENIED.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Apr-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Drohan for Stephen Driggs (Petitioner).

Counsel stated that the Responent has not been served, and he requested for a three week continuance. The Request for Restraining Orders was continued to May 2, 2012 at 1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204. Notice of New Hearing Date (with no TRO issued) signed in open court.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Linda Forster CSR #13286. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
